nasb.text: So the woman ran quickly and told her husband, “Behold, the man who came the other day has appeared to me.”

esv.text: So the woman ran quickly and told her husband, “Behold, the man who came to me the other day has appeared to me.”

cnv.text: 婦人急忙跑去告訴丈夫，對他說：“那天到我這裡來的那人，又向我顯現了。”

ccb.text: 她赶忙跑去告诉她丈夫说：“那天来的那人又向我显现了。”
